title: At G20 summit meet, Biden and Xi discuss nuclear war, Taiwan and North Korea
description: Apart from 'Russia's irresponsible threats of nuclear use' Biden also 'raised concerns about the DPRK's (North Korea) provocative behaviour'. | World News
